RevisionEvent.Note: Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: The Narsarsuaq (NRSQ/NAQ) Geophysical Observatory is a key research facility in southern Greenland operated by the Technical University of Denmark (DTU Space) and international partners. It serves as a vital hub for monitoring space weather, the Earth's magnetic field, and auroral activity.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge: Danish Meteorological Institute, Denmark

InformationURL.Name: THEMIS Fluxgate Ground-based Magnetometer (GMAG) Web Site
InformationURL.Description: THEMIS makes data available from GMAG stations in the United States, Canada, Denmark, Greenland, Norway, Sweden, Iceland, and Russia, and Antarctica.

InformationURL.Name: Technical University of Danmark
InformationURL.Description: Introduction to the DTU magnetometer data, plots, maps, etc.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
